commitMessage:
fix(about-mobile): add consistent horizontal margins to gallery and fix post-modal touch responsiveness

- AboutPageMobile: gallery section now uses 24px horizontal padding, maxWidth 430px, centered
- MasonryGallery: prevent only the very next single pointer release after close (no double suppression)
- MasonryGallery: raise modal z-index above nav/drawer, ensure box-sizing: border-box for container
- Verified build and ensured no lingering scroll/touch blockers after modal close
